description_long: This is a large, cartoonish mallet-style hammer with a cylindrical blue head, capped at both ends with thick yellow bands adorned with small blue diamond-shaped studs. The head features a single orange circular button or accent on its top center. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and colored orange, appearing to be made of wood or a similar material. The hammer's design is playful and exaggerated, with smooth, clean surfaces and no visible signs of wear or damage. The overall construction suggests it is intended for light-hearted or decorative use, possibly as a prop or in a game-like urban environment.
description: A large, cartoon-style mallet with a blue cylindrical head, yellow banded ends, and an orange straight handle. Features a single orange accent on top and decorative blue studs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular blue face of the hammer head, surrounded by a yellow band and the orange handle centered below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the blue cylindrical head, yellow end bands with blue studs, and the orange button on top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite circular blue face and yellow band, with the handle visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, displaying the blue head, yellow bands, blue studs, and orange button.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical mallet head, blue with yellow banded ends, no claws or peens, single orange accent on top.
